entities.context: Three-axis pricing framework balancing JDs, seats, and time

entities.name: Job Descriptions
entities.context: Pricing axis measuring how many JDs can be processed within a contract

entities.name: Seats
entities.context: Pricing axis measuring number of users (recruiters/hiring managers) with access

entities.name: Time
entities.context: Pricing axis measuring agreement length (e.g., 6 months vs 12 months)
